title: lactaria kilneri
intro: Lactaria kilneri, also known as the milk-cap mushroom, is a species of fungus in the family Russulaceae. It is known for its unique ability to produce a milky white latex when injured, which is said to have medicinal properties. The lactaria kilneri contains compounds with antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which may help to boost the immune system and provide relief from various health issues such as digestive problems and inflammation. In herbal preparations, lactaria kilneri is often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, and capsules to support overall health and well-being.
